heading: EMPLOYMENT SECURITY ADMINISTRATIVE FINANCING
label: IX EMPLOYMENT SECURITY ADMINISTRATIVE FINANCING
notes: Codification1954—, , in amending subchapter generally substituted subchapter heading “EMPLOYMENT SECURITY ADMINISTRATIVE FINANCING” for “TAX ON EMPLOYMENT OF EIGHT OR MORE”.Act Aug. 5, 1954, ch. 657, § 268 Stat. 668

Prior Law; Tax on Employers of Eight or MoreFormer subchapter IX, sections 1101–1103, 1105–1110, , §§ 901–903, 905–910, , related to taxes on employers of eight or more. Section 4 of , , which act enacted Title 26, Internal Revenue Code of 1939, provided that all laws and parts of laws codified into the I.R.C. 1939, to the extent that they related exclusively to internal revenue laws, were repealed. Provisions of I.R.C. 1939 were generally repealed by , Internal Revenue Code of 1954 (, ). See, also, section 7807 of said Title 26, I.R.C. 1954, respecting rules in effect upon enactment of I.R.C. 1954. The I.R.C. 1954 was redesignated I.R.C. 1986 by , , .
